incorrect.source_says: Wnt-C59 is a Wnt PORCN inhibitor used for the Wnt-OFF step of cardiac differentiation (it is the Wnt inhibitor, not an agonist). The CHIR99021/Chiron step (Day 0) is the Wnt activator; the Wnt-C59 step (Day 2) is the Wnt inhibitor.
incorrect.evidence_quote: After 48 h (Day 2), media were replaced with RBA media supplemented with 2 μM Wnt C59 (SelleckChem, S7037, Houston, TX, USA).

incorrect.source_says: 37 (degrees C). The extraction's own evidence quote contains '37 °C' yet temperature_c was left null.
Cardiac. The bundle is tagged organoid_type 'cardiac' and the authors describe the 3D EHT system as a cardiac organoid.
incorrect.evidence_quote: interrogate hiPSC-CM survival, hypertrophy, and expression at a cellular level in the context of an HCM-causative variant with hypocontractile function cultured in a 3D cardiac organoid

recall_misses.item: Hs27a human stromal cells (EHT co-culture cellular component)
recall_misses.source_says: EHTs are cast from 500k hiPSC-CMs plus 100k human Hs27a stromal cells; this second cell type was not captured in source_cells.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: A total of 500k Day 25 hiPSC-CMs and 100k human Hs27a stromal cells were mixed with 3 U/mL thrombin from bovine plasma
recall_misses.source_loc: methods_text 4.5 Casting of Engineered Heart Tissues (EHTs)

recall_misses.item: Fibrin matrix for 3D EHT (fibrinogen 5 mg/mL + thrombin 3 U/mL)
recall_misses.source_says: The actual 3D tissue/organoid scaffold is a fibrin gel formed from bovine fibrinogen and thrombin; only Matrigel coating was captured as matrix.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: mixed with 3 U/mL thrombin from bovine plasma (Sigma, T4648, St. Louis, MO, USA) and 5 mg/mL bovine fibrinogen (Sigma, E8630, St. Louis, MO, USA) in 100 μL EHT media
recall_misses.source_loc: methods_text 4.5 Casting of Engineered Heart Tissues (EHTs)

recall_misses.source_says: A detailed day-resolved protocol is given (Day -2 seed, Day 0 Chiron, Day 2 Wnt-C59, Day 4 unsupplemented, Day 6 CM media to Day 20, freeze Day 25; EHTs cultured 3 weeks) but timeline=[] in extraction.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: hiPSCs were seeded ... (Day-2). After 48 h (Day 0) ... After 48 h (Day 2) ... After 48 h (Day 4) ... After 48 h (Day 6) ... replaced every other day until Day 20 ... frozen at Day 25

recall_misses.item: Multi-stage media (RBA, RPMI-based CM media, DMEM-based CM media, EHT media)
recall_misses.source_says: Only mTeSR+ captured as base_media; the differentiation/maturation media (RBA = RPMI+BSA+ascorbic acid; RPMI-based CM media with B27; DMEM-based high-glucose CM media; EHT media) were not represented as base media.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: media were replaced with RBA media (RPMI with L-glutamine ... 500 μg/mL bovine serum albumin (BSA ...), 213 μg/mL ascorbic acid ...)

recall_misses.source_says: ascorbic acid is listed as a supplement with concentration null, but the source gives 213 μg/mL.
BSA supplement extracted with concentration null; source states 500 μg/mL.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: 500 μg/mL bovine serum albumin (BSA; Sigma, A9418-50G, St. Louis, MO, USA)

recall_misses.source_says: puromycin supplement extracted with concentration null; source states 0.175 μg/mL.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: mTeSR+ with 0.175 μg/mL puromycin dihydrochloride (Thermo Fisher, A1113803, Waltham, MA, USA)

recall_misses.item: Sodium L-lactate (4 mM) metabolic enrichment factor
recall_misses.source_says: Lactate-based metabolic selection step (glucose-free DMEM + 4 mM sodium L-lactate) is a key CM purification factor; not captured.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: DMEM without glucose or L-glutamine ... supplemented with 4 mM Sodium L-lactate (Sigma, 71718-10G, St. Louis, MA, USA)

recall_misses.item: Aminocaproic acid concentration (5 g/L) in EHT media
recall_misses.source_says: aminocaproic acid extracted with concentration null; source states 5 g/L.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: 5 g/L aminocaproic acid (Sigma, A2 504-256-100G, St. Louis, MO, USA)
recall_misses.source_loc: methods_text 4.5 Casting of Engineered Heart Tissues (EHTs)

recall_misses.source_says: 5% FBS, used repeatedly in CM replating and EHT/dissociation media, not captured as a supplement.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: replated at 65k/cm 2 in RPMI-based cardiomyocyte media with 5% FBS on 20 μg/mL Matrigel-coated plates

recall_misses.source_says: Multiple culture-relevant seeding densities are stated; none captured (no density field populated).
recall_misses.evidence_quote: hiPSCs were seeded at 65k/cm 2 in mTeSR+ ... Day 25 hiPSC-CMs were thawed at 500 k/cm 2 ... replated at 250 k/cm 2

recall_misses.source_says: matrix.percent is null (correctly, since Matrigel here is coating by μg/mL); but the stated coating concentrations 80/20/10 μg/mL were not captured anywhere.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: on plates coated with 80 μg/mL Matrigel ... 20 μg/mL Matrigel-coated plates ... 10 μg/mL Matrigel-coated plates

recall_misses.item: Tyrode solution ionic composition incl. 1.8 mM CaCl2 (physiological calcium for contractility assay)
recall_misses.source_says: Functional assay buffer with defined calcium (1.8 mM) and the RPMI vs DMEM low-(0.4 mM) vs high-(1.8 mM) calcium media comparison central to the maturation result is not captured.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: 2 mL Tyrode solution (1.8 mM calcium chloride ... in H 2 O)

recall_misses.item: Trypsin/DNAse dissociation and papain dissociation reagents
recall_misses.source_says: 0.5% trypsin in 500 μM EDTA with 25 μU DNAse I (monolayer) and 40 U/mL papain-based solution (EHT) are the dissociation methods; only EDTA captured as passaging.
recall_misses.evidence_quote: dissociated with 0.5% trypsin (Invitrogen, 15090046 ...) in 500 μM EDTA with 25 μU DNAse I

notes: Of items the extractor reported, most dose/factor calls are correct (ROCK 10 uM, Chiron 5 uM, Wnt-C59 2 uM, 5% CO2, Matrigel, mTeSR+, iPSC/human, EDTA passaging). Two clear correctness errors: Wnt-C59 mislabeled 'agonist' (it is a Wnt/PORCN inhibitor), and temperature_c left null despite '37 C' being in the extractor's own quote; organoid_type set to 'other' though this is a cardiac (EHT/3D cardiac organoid) study. Recall is the dominant weakness: the entire EHT 3D system was missed (Hs27a stromal co-culture cells; fibrin matrix from 5 mg/mL fibrinogen + 3 U/mL thrombin), the day-resolved differentiation timeline is empty, lactate metabolic-enrichment factor missed, and nearly every stated concentration on captured supplements (ascorbic acid 213 ug/mL, BSA 500 ug/mL, puromycin 0.175 ug/mL, FBS 5%, aminocaproic acid 5 g/L, p/s 50 U/mL) was left null. Tables (sgRNA, primers, antibodies, apoptosis array) are non-culture metadata and reasonably excluded; the chief table-level miss is none for culture recipe but the cell/matrix/timeline recipe lives in methods_text and was under-extracted. Multimodal: 4 figures + 4 tables present in bundle.
